data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Amazon's design reduces decision-making time by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Clean interface with categorized products and search functionality.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design of clickable areas are optimized for ease of access and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Large buttons and intuitive navigation paths to facilitate user interaction.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adopts familiar design patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Conforms to standard e-commerce UX conventions for consistent user experiences.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design that enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Aesthetic choices contribute to increased user satisfaction and engagement.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Items placed close together are perceived as related, aiding navigation.
data.technical_spec: Grouped content helps users locate related products and information efficiently.
